```ts

function getModel<TProvider extends KnownProvider, TModelId extends keyof (typeof MODELS)[TProvider]>(
  provider: TProvider, modelId: TModelId
): Model<ModelApi<TProvider, TModelId>>;
```

`KnownProvider` is a union of ~35 string literals (`"anthropic" | "openai" | "google" | ...`). `provider` from `.slice()` is `string`.

```ts
if (isToolCallEventType("bash", event) && event.input.command && SED_PATTERN.test(event.input.command)) {
```
